Class TouchInputModule

Namespace
UnityEngine.EventSystems
Assembly
UnityEngine.UI.dll
[Obsolete("TouchInputModule is no longer required as Touch input is now handled in StandaloneInputModule.")]
public class TouchInputModule : PointerInputModule
